## Source: amazon-inspector (77973c6ca0ba60bf7105d4250b88b0fd7b3304dd3fe9ead1072912d8e724b21f)

## Source: ossf-package-analysis (f14c6067592b5e8373b113b4ce00efb17bd77430b4ba0604fec657be43240e8f)
The OpenSSF Package Analysis project identified 'wn-idv-persona-client' @ 99.0.4 (npm) as malicious.

It is considered malicious because:

- The package communicates with a domain associated with malicious activity.
